current_milestone: Phase G.1 runtime collection shipped — dashboard panel 10 is live
notes: Gates 1-7 all still green. Phase G.1 complete: src/engine/runtime_writer.ts ships atomic snapshots with 50ms debounce, idempotent attach, shutdown handlers, and tamper-alarm surface. EngineState gained an onOp hook; ops.ts calls it after every mutation; MCP server installs the writer by default (off in Vitest). 54/54 Vitest green (45 existing + 9 new); tsc --noEmit clean. All five local gate scripts (1-5) re-run green. runtime.json now populates on every real weavory process and surfaces in dashboard panel 10.
